q: What services do you offer?
a: Manicures, pedicures, gel nails, dip powder nails, acrylic nails, nail art, hair services, waxing, brow waxing, brow tinting, and kids' nail services. We do it all! 💅

q: Do you take walk-ins?
a: Yes — walk-ins are welcome! Appointments are recommended to guarantee your preferred time, especially on weekends and busy periods.

q: How do I book an appointment?
a: Just reply here on WhatsApp with your desired service, preferred date and time, and we'll get you booked in! ✨

q: Where are you located?
a: Parliament Street, Bayparl Building (the pink building), Downtown Nassau. Heading east on Bay Street, turn right onto Parliament Street — we're on the ground floor.

q: What are your hours?
a: Monday to Saturday 9am to 7pm. Message us to confirm availability for your preferred day.

q: What is the difference between gel, dip powder, and acrylic nails?
a: Gel is lightweight, cured under LED light, great for 2 weeks of wear. Dip powder is stronger and healthier for your natural nail — lasts about 3 weeks. Acrylic is most durable for length and sculpting. Our techs will recommend what's best for your lifestyle.

q: How long does a gel manicure take?
a: A gel manicure typically takes 45–60 minutes. Dip powder or acrylics can take 60–90 minutes. We'll give you a time estimate when you book.

q: Do you do hair services?
a: Yes! We offer hair services alongside our nail services — one stop for all your beauty needs. 💇

q: Do you offer waxing?
a: Yes — waxing services including body waxing, brow waxing and brow tinting are available.

q: Do you do kids nails?
a: Yes! We have special kids' nail services including our sweet princess package. Little ones are very welcome.

q: Do you accommodate bridal parties or groups?
a: Absolutely — we love bridal parties and group bookings! Contact us in advance so we can arrange the right setup for your group size and timing.

q: How much do services cost?
a: Pricing varies by service. Message us with the specific service you're interested in and we'll give you an accurate quote.

q: Is dip powder better than acrylic?
a: Dip powder is generally considered healthier for your natural nail — stronger than gel but lighter than acrylic. It's our preferred recommendation for nail health.

q: Do you offer nail art?
a: Yes — nail art designs are available. Bring inspiration images or let our creative technicians suggest something perfect for you.

q: How do I care for my nails after a gel manicure?
a: Avoid excessive water exposure in the first few hours. Use cuticle oil daily, wear gloves for heavy cleaning, and come back in 2 weeks for a fill or fresh set.

q: Do you do pedicures?
a: Yes — we offer a full range of pedicures from our quick classic to our luxurious spa pedicure experience. Perfect for neglected feet!

q: Do you have a relaxing atmosphere?
a: Definitely. Our lounge is upbeat, clean, and welcoming — clients describe it as a vibe. We also offer water, tea, or coffee while you're being serviced. ☕

q: Are you good for cruise ship visitors?
a: Absolutely — we're located in downtown Nassau, convenient from the cruise port. Many of our clients are cruise guests. Book ahead to secure your time slot.

q: Do you do mens nail services?
a: Yes! Our Men's Manicure includes an invigorating hand soak, nail trim, filing, cuticle care, mask treatment with hot towel wrap, and hand massage. Gentleman approved. 💪

q: How often should I get a manicure?
a: For gel nails every 2–3 weeks is ideal. For dip powder, every 3–4 weeks. Regular maintenance keeps your nails healthy and looking great.

q: Can I get a full set of acrylics?
a: Yes — full acrylic sets are available. Our technicians will shape, sculpt, and style to your preference.

q: Do you remove old gel or acrylic?
a: Yes — professional removal is available. We use gentle techniques to protect your natural nail during the process.

q: Do you have colour options?
a: Hundreds of colours! From classic nudes and reds to bold designs and seasonal shades. You'll have plenty to choose from.

q: How is hygiene maintained at your salon?
a: Cleanliness is a top priority. All tools are sterilized between clients, files and buffers are single-use, and pedicure tubs use disposable liners.

q: Can I bring a friend?
a: Of course! We love when clients come with friends. Book together and we'll try to seat you side by side for the experience.

q: What happens if I break a nail before my next appointment?
a: Come in for a repair! Single nail repairs are quick and affordable. WhatsApp us and we'll fit you in as soon as possible.

q: Do you offer brow services?
a: Yes — brow waxing and brow tinting are available. Perfect for clean, defined brows that frame your face.

q: Is parking available nearby?
a: We're in the Bayparl Building on Parliament Street downtown. Street parking and nearby lots are available.

q: Can I get a manicure and pedicure in the same visit?
a: Absolutely — many clients book both together. Allow approximately 2 hours for a full mani-pedi experience.

q: Do you accept walk-ins for quick services?
a: Yes — for quick fixes like polish changes or repairs, walk-ins are usually accommodated. For full sets or pedicures, booking ahead is recommended.

q: Do you offer gift certificates?
a: Yes — gift certificates are a wonderful treat for someone special. Contact us to arrange one.

q: How long does a pedicure take?
a: A classic pedicure takes about 45–60 minutes. Our spa pedicure with extras is approximately 75–90 minutes.

q: Can I bring kids?
a: Yes — children are welcome and we have kid-specific services including our princess nail package. A lovely treat for little ones.

q: Do you do makeup?
a: Yes — makeup services are available. Great for events, weddings, or just a special occasion.

q: What is your cancellation policy?
a: We appreciate as much notice as possible for cancellations so we can offer the slot to another client. Same-day cancellations may incur a fee.

q: Do you have wifi?
a: Yes — complimentary wifi is available for all clients during your visit.

q: Are you good for a girls day out?
a: Absolutely! Nail Lounge is the perfect spot for a girls' day, bridal outing, or birthday treat. Book your group in advance.

q: What is a dip powder manicure?
a: Dip powder nails are applied by brushing a gel base onto the nail then dipping into coloured powder — no UV light needed. Stronger than gel, healthier than acrylic, lasts 3+ weeks.

q: How do I get started or make my first booking?
a: Just message us here on WhatsApp with your service of interest and preferred date and time. We'll confirm your appointment and look forward to welcoming you! 💅
